nodes.name: 鸟纲
nodes.summary: 鸟纲（Aves）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10767种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭等10767种鸟类。

nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: Wetar myzomela
nodes.summary: The Wetar myzomela or crimson-hooded myzomela (Myzomela kuehni) is a species of bird in the family Meliphagidae. It is endemic to Wetar. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests, subtropical or tropical moist shrubland, and rural gardens. It is threatened by habitat loss. References
nodes.shortSummary: The Wetar myzomela or crimson-hooded myzomela (Myzomela kuehni) is a species of bird in the family Meliphagidae. It is endemic to Wetar.

nodes.name: Wetar myzomela
